title: My daily routine
explanation:
My daily routine

Read the text and do the exercises.

Hi! I'm Sofia. I get up at seven o'clock every day. I have a shower and eat breakfast. I leave home at half past eight and take the bus to work. I work in a bookshop from nine to five. In the evening I cook dinner and watch TV. I go to bed at eleven.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Sofia has a ____ in the morning. | *shower | bus | book
She leaves home at half past ____. | *eight | five | eleven
She works from nine to ____. | *five | seven | eight
In the evening she ____ dinner. | *cooks | sleeps | works

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.feedback: Breakfast in the morning before work.

questions.text: The text is about Sofia's [*daily routine|holiday|family].
